nasb.text: then your elders and your judges shall go out and measure the distance to the cities which are around the slain one.

esv.text: then your elders and your judges shall come out, and they shall measure the distance to the surrounding cities.

cnv.text: 這樣，你的長老和審判官就要出去，量一下從被殺的人那裡到四周城市的距離。

ccb.text: 当地的长老和审判官就要去测量一下尸体距附近各城邑的距离。
